_comment: INC-19 type-contract for eb_bullpen_posteriors (E11.1-W8a). Derived from the live BETTING.EB_BULLPEN_POSTERIORS schema (2026-06-29). double_pinned = FLOAT cols the DuckDB branch casts ::double in its TYPE-PIN block so the S3 parquet / lakehouse_ext type is stable across upstream NUMBER<->FLOAT flips. Intended type change => regenerate (scripts/gen_type_contract.py --write) in the same PR + operator DROP+rebuild.
